title: AI-SDLC Orchestrator Failure-Pattern Catalogue v1
description: RFC-0015 §13 Q9 source-of-truth for the autonomous-orchestrator playbook (Phase 2 / AISDLC-169.2). Validated at orchestrator startup; schema-violation = orchestrator refuses to start.

version.description: Catalogue schema version. v1 ships the 9 default patterns from RFC-0015 §5.1 (8 original + StackedPRBaseSquashed).

mode.description: Catalogued failure mode. Must match a registered handler in `pipeline-cli/src/orchestrator/playbook/handlers/<mode>.ts`.

budget.description: Per-worker retry cap before escalation. 0 = escalate immediately (equivalent to escalateImmediately: true).

escalateImmediately.description: When true, skip remediation and tag PR with needs-human-attention immediately. Useful for projects that prefer human triage over autonomous fix attempts (per RFC §13 Q7).

description.description: Operator-facing description of the mode + remediation.
